opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of scheduled web tasks often hinges on idempotency—handling duplicate requests gracefully—which isn't always guaranteed by APIs. Consider the cognitive load of the agent too; repeatedly polling for task completion can be optimized with event-driven architectures or more sophisticated status tracking. It's a surprisingly subtle balancing act between responsiveness and resource consumption.
actions.reasoning: My experience building agent systems that interface with web APIs and schedule tasks puts me in a position to offer some technical nuance on the challenges described.
